'''âz-l-v''' ('''kazalav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rimple|rimple]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rimple|rimple]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âz-l-v
|-
! Lemma
| kazalav
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizalav|thizalav]] || [[word:jizalav|jizalav]] || [[word:shizalav|shizalav]] || [[word:kizalav|kizalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzalav|thuthuzalav]] || [[word:jujuzalav|jujuzalav]] || [[word:shushuzalav|shushuzalav]] || [[word:kukuzalav|kukuzalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzalav|thuzalav]] || [[word:juzalav|juzalav]] || [[word:shuzalav|shuzalav]] || [[word:kuzalav|kuzalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzalav|thuzalav]] || [[word:juzalav|juzalav]] || [[word:shuzalav|shuzalav]] || [[word:kuzalav|kuzalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezalav|thezalav]] || [[word:jezalav|jezalav]] || [[word:shezalav|shezalav]] || [[word:kezalav|kezalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozalav|thothozalav]] || [[word:jojozalav|jojozalav]] || [[word:shoshozalav|shoshozalav]] || [[word:kokozalav|kokozalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozalav|thozalav]] || [[word:jozalav|jozalav]] || [[word:shozalav|shozalav]] || [[word:kozalav|kozalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozalav|thozalav]] || [[word:jozalav|jozalav]] || [[word:shozalav|shozalav]] || [[word:kozalav|kozalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzalav|thĂŠzalav]] || [[word:jĂŠzalav|jĂŠzalav]] || [[word:shĂŠzalav|shĂŠzalav]] || [[word:kĂŠzalav|kĂŠzalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazalav|thathazalav]] || [[word:jajazalav|jajazalav]] || [[word:shashazalav|shashazalav]] || [[word:kakazalav|kakazalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazalav|thazalav]] || [[word:jazalav|jazalav]] || [[word:shazalav|shazalav]] || [[word:kazalav|kazalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazalav|thazalav]] || [[word:jazalav|jazalav]] || [[word:shazalav|shazalav]] || [[word:kazalav|kazalav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazalav|shazalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazalav|goshazalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazalav|gokishazalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazalavnĂŒ|shazalavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazalavnknĂŒ|goshazalavnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazalavnĂŒ|gokishazalavnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazalavshĂ«|shazalavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazalavnkshĂ«|goshazalavnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazalavshĂ«|gokishazalavshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazalavro|shazalavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazalavnkro|goshazalavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazalavro|gokishazalavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazalavmu|shazalavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazalavnkmu|goshazalavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazalavmu|gokishazalavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazalavsher|shazalavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazalavnksher|goshazalavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazalavsher|gokishazalavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazalavng|shazalavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazalavnkng|goshazalavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazalavng|gokishazalavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazalavya|shazalavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazalavnkya|goshazalavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazalavya|gokishazalavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazalavyam|shazalavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazalavnkyam|goshazalavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazalavyam|gokishazalavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazalavnĂŒshĂ«|shazalavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazalavnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazalavnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazalavnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazalavnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazalavnĂŒro|shazalavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazalavnknĂŒro|goshazalavnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazalavnĂŒro|gokishazalavnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazalavnĂŒmu|shazalavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazalavnknĂŒmu|goshazalavnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazalavnĂŒmu|gokishazalavnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazalavshĂ«nĂŒ|shazalavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazalavnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazalavnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazalavshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazalavshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazalavshĂ«ro|shazalavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazalavnkshĂ«ro|goshazalavnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazalavshĂ«ro|gokishazalavshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazalavshĂ«mu|shazalavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazalavnkshĂ«mu|goshazalavnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazalavshĂ«mu|gokishazalavshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazalavronĂŒ|shazalavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazalavnkronĂŒ|goshazalavnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazalavronĂŒ|gokishazalavronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazalavroshĂ«|shazalavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazalavnkroshĂ«|goshazalavnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazalavroshĂ«|gokishazalavroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazalavromu|shazalavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazalavnkromu|goshazalavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazalavromu|gokishazalavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazalavmunĂŒ|shazalavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazalavnkmunĂŒ|goshazalavnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazalavmunĂŒ|gokishazalavmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazalavmushĂ«|shazalavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazalavnkmushĂ«|goshazalavnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazalavmushĂ«|gokishazalavmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazalavmuro|shazalavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazalavnkmuro|goshazalavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazalavmuro|gokishazalavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
